title: Conflicting thermal alerts disambiguation
query_text: Monitoring shows a temperature alert on rack-c, but the rack telemetry also shows power draw has decreased on those nodes. Is this a real emergency or a false positive?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: This is a real emergency, not a false positive. The temperature rise is genuine (rack-c ambient 35.8°C, above the 30°C action threshold). The power decrease is explained by thermal throttling: nodes c01–c04 reduced CPU frequency by 40%, which cuts power draw as a self-protection mechanism — consistent with elevated temperatures, not a sign of normalcy. The crac_status.json confirms CRAC crac-c1 failed. Drain the affected nodes and escalate to facilities.
